{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2075 aims to grant residents of Long-Term Care Facilities the right to access a visitor or healthcare and social service provider in person.",
    "The COVID-19 pandemic cost the lives of millions of Americans and disrupted the lives of millions more.",
    "The working group found that visitation is essential for preventing social isolation and loneliness among people who reside in Long-Term Care Facilities.",
    "Family interaction played a critical role in identifying care issues and advocating for care in Long-Term Care Facilities.",
    "AB 2075 aims to formalize recommendations for visitation rights into law during a public health emergency."
